---
title: "Initial Deepflora results"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Accuracy Metrics

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

beeplants <- readRDS("data/beeplants.rds")

overall <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_overall_results_band-1.csv")
perobs <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_per_observations_results_band-1.csv")
persp <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_per_species_results_band-1.csv")

persp.metrics <- persp$metric

persp.l <- persp |> dplyr::select(-dset_name,-model,-loss,-exp_id,-pretrained,-metric,-date, -batch_size,-epoch,-thres,-band) |>
  t() |> as.data.frame() |> setNames(persp.metrics) |>
  rownames_to_column("scientificName") |> 
  mutate(scientificName = gsub("\\."," ",scientificName)) %>%
  separate_wider_delim(scientificName, delim=" ",
                       names=c("genus","sp"),
                       too_few = "align_start",
                       too_many = "merge",
                       cols_remove = FALSE)

# all bee floral resource sp (Grozinger + Fowler)
persp.fr <- persp.l %>%
  filter(genus %in% beeplants$genus$genus |
           scientificName %in% beeplants$species$scientificName)

# all PA bee floral resource sp (Grozinger list)
persp.fr.g <- persp.l %>%
  filter(genus %in% beeplants$genus$genus |
           scientificName %in% (beeplants$species %>% 
                                  dplyr::filter(source == "Grozinger") %>% 
                                  pull(scientificName)))

# above 50 support subset
persp.fr.g50 <- persp.fr.g %>% arrange(support) %>% top_n(50)

top50 <- persp.fr.g50$scientificName

```

## Look at sp predictions

```{r}
library(terra)

plantifs <- rast("data/initial_state_college_raw.tif")
naiptif <- rast("data-raw/m_4007710_se_18_1_20170509.tif")

# define presence as > 0.5
plantifs.yn <- plantifs > 0.5

# sum of present species
plantifs.sum <- sum(plantifs.yn)

writeRaster(plantifs.sum, "data/sum.tif")

```

## Look at 50 of the top floral resource species

```{r}

# match tif names to names from accuracy metrics
tif50 <- names(plantifs)[which(names(plantifs) %in% top50)]

# on is missing so find it
top50[which(!(top50 %in% names(plantifs)))]  # "Symphyotrichum novae angliae"

# it's because the name is missing a hyphen 
tif50 <- append(tif50, "Symphyotrichum novae-angliae")

plantifs50 <- plantifs[[tif50]]

plantifs50.yn <- plantifs50 >0.5
plantifs50.sum <- sum(plantifs50.yn)

writeRaster(plantifs50.sum, "data/sum50.tif")

terra::plot(plan)

```

# individual plants
```{r}

for(i in 1:10){
  writeRaster(plantifs50[[tif50[i]]], 
              file.path("data",paste0(gsub(" ","_",tif50[i]),".tif")))
}


```
